meta.title: Enterprise LLM - Integrated Enterprise Platform | D'auchy.Studio
meta.description: Enterprise LLM - An all-in-one enterprise platform integrating project management, knowledge sharing, and AI assistants. A unified solution that maximizes team potential.

hero.title: Enterprise LLM
hero.subtitle: Project Management × Knowledge Sharing × AI Assistant
hero.tagline: An integrated platform that makes enterprise work smarter
hero.description:
This system is an all-in-one environment that combines project management, communication, knowledge sharing, and AI support.
From daily tasks to large-scale projects, it maximizes team potential.

coreFeatures.title: Streamline Operations with All-in-One Features
coreFeatures.subtitle:
From project management to AI assistants, integrate all functions your enterprise needs.
Maximize team productivity.

features.title: Authentication & Account Management
features.description: Securely manage user information in a secure authentication environment
details: Enhanced security with Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
Complete user profile management (name, department, photo)
Multi-language UI support for Japanese, English, and Vietnamese

features.title: Organization Management
features.description: Centralized management from company information to plan management
details: Integrated management of company information, location, and contacts
Flexible plan support from Basic to Enterprise
Smooth setup of administrator and member permissions

features.title: Project Management
features.description: Advanced project management with AI prediction features
details: Intuitive operation of progress rates, priorities, and members
Milestone management to visualize important milestones
Risk management and future prediction to improve project success rates

features.title: Task Management
features.description: Streamline tasks with AI-suggested kanban boards
details: Drag & drop kanban board
Subtask feature to break down large work
AI suggestions for new tasks based on project status

features.title: Chat & Communication
details: Real-time conversations in one-on-one and group chats
@mention feature with automatic translation support
Quick search of past conversation history

features.title: Knowledge Base
features.description: Internal Wiki environment with AI search functionality
details: Article creation, tag classification, and history management
Rich editor for creating readable articles
AI search automatically presents related documents

features.title: News Integration
features.description: Automatic collection of industry news and project-related information
details: Latest news distribution in business and tech fields
Automatic collection of news related to ongoing projects
Alert notification for important information

features.title: Meetings & Minutes
features.description: Meeting management system with AI summary functionality
details: Meeting schedule, participant, and URL management
AI summary automatically summarizes meeting content
Multi-language translation for meeting minutes

features.title: Search & Inquiry
features.description: Instantly discover information with AI-powered cross-search
details: Batch search of projects, tasks, and knowledge
AI search that understands word meanings
Centralized management of internal Q&A history

features.title: AI Assistant
features.description: Advanced AI support compatible with OpenAI & Gemini
details: Switch between OpenAI and Gemini according to usage
Improve work efficiency with automatic summarization, translation, and sentiment analysis
High-precision answers using internal data with RAG search

features.title: Multi-language Support
features.description: Complete multi-language support for international teams
details: Complete support for Japanese, English, and Vietnamese
Automatic chat translation for peace of mind for international teams
Timezone and currency support for overseas office collaboration

features.title: Dashboard & Analytics
features.description: Visualization analysis of progress and performance
details: Graphical representation of project and task status
Understanding performance by member
Custom report output to Excel and PDF

systemManagement.title: Enterprise-Level System Management
systemManagement.subtitle: Management functions designed with security and governance as top priorities

systemFeatures.title: AI Usage Management
systemFeatures.description: Centrally manage API keys and usage

pricing.title: Flexible Plans for Different Team Sizes
pricing.subtitle: From startups to large enterprises, we provide optimal plans according to scale

cta.title: Ready to Maximize Your Team's Potential?
cta.description:
With Enterprise LLM, integrate everything from project management to AI utilization.
Experience the integrated platform that maximizes enterprise productivity.
